problem: Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary?
hypothesis: If Neuroinflammation reduction via microglial targeting is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
